title: URAファイナルズ決勝にむけて

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Here it is. The final race.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The stage where <chrname> can shine
the brightest. Brighter than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Of course, that goes for my trainee too.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: The grand finale... I'm gonna get the gold.
choice_data_list: Let's both give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Your days with your trainee and my
days with mine... Let's see which comes out on
top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, the final race of the URA Finale begins!
